3279600.name: The Thrill of the Fight 2 Spectator
3279600.description:
Gather your friends to watch your matches with a "live sports" style camera on a connected PC for your matches in The Thrill of The Fight 2 currently available on Meta Quest. 

  • Host or Join The Thrill of The FIght 2 custom lobbies to spectate matches!

  • Choose cameras and angles for optimal coverage of the moment-to-moment action!  

  • Record tournaments, friendly spars or grudge matches from your PC with the Auto-Director!
3279600.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
